{
  "claims": [
    "Lesley Hu is the founder of Pierce’s Pledge, an organization dedicated to keeping children safe throughout custody disputes.",
    "Pierce’s Pledge aims to reduce risks of firearm violence by focusing on the actions of legal professionals in contested child custody cases.",
    "The emotional and volatile nature of custody battles can lead individuals with firearm ownership to act impulsively.",
    "Pierce’s Pledge requires individuals to declare weapons they possess and store them in a secure off-site and third-party location during custody disputes.",
    "Advocacy for voluntary separation from firearms during custody battles is meant to protect children."
